title: Trial Spawns Dont Disable Themselves
description: Stops custom made trial spawners from disabling themselves after a single use
body:
#
Behold, my stuff Did you know that custom-made trial spawners such as the ones in trickier trials or in tower of chambers arent reusable? Due to some strange coding from mojang, these custom trial spawners will reset their spawner entry when their cooldown ends! This mod stops it from getting reset, and allows these trial spawners to be used multiple times. If this has already happened to trial spawners in your world, this will not fix them. The only fix for these already broken spawners will be right clicking on them with a spawn egg. This mod will prevent them from breaking again though. ### TSDDT and Neoforge! Playing on Neoforge but want to use TSDDT? Look no further than [Sinytra](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector)! TSDDT has full compatability with Sinytra for playing on Neoforge. [![Milkev Gaming Ko-fi Support Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b86091251537403a7244affd5494198a163450.jpeg)](https://ko-fi.com/milkevgaming) #### Programmed using IntelliJ
